name: Dexamethasone
description: Corticosteroid roba na dogon lokaci. An yi amfani da shi don edema na cerebral (high altitude cerebral edema - HACE, TBI), rashin lafiyar jiki mai tsanani, edema na iska, da rikicin adrenal. Anti-mai kumburi, ba anabolic ba.
indications: Cerebral edema daga ƙari ko kumburi
Mummunan rashin lafiyar jiki (haɗe da epinephrine)
dose: Cerebral edema / HACE: 8-10 mg IV / IM farko, sannan 4 mg q6h. Hanyar iska: 10 MG IV sau ɗaya. Croup: 0.6 mg/kg IM/PO (max 16mg). Rikicin adrenal: 4 MG IV.
window: HACE: Ba da wuri-wuri tare da saukowa kai tsaye.
contraindications: Cutar cututtukan fungal (ba tare da ɗaukar hoto ba)
Alurar rigakafin ƙwayoyin cuta masu rai a cikin kwanaki 30 (dangi)
warnings: Baya maye gurbin zuriya da iskar oxygen don HACE -- yi amfani da shi azaman ƙari kawai.
Hyperglycemia -- saka idanu glucose na jini a cikin masu ciwon sukari.
Magunguna guda ɗaya don gaggawa gabaɗaya lafiyayye.

pediatric.dose: Croup: 0.6 mg/kg PO/IM (max 16 mg). Cerebral edema: 0.5-1 mg / kg IV (max 10 mg). edema na iska: 0.5 mg/kg IV.

obstetric.note: 12 mg IM q24h x 2 allurai da aka yi amfani da su don hanzarta balaga huhu na tayin a cikin makonni 24-34 na ciki a cikin aikin da ba a kai ba. Tattauna tare da mafi kyawun mai samarwa.

source: JTS CPG / Wilderness Medicine / Standard Emergency Pharmacology
